predictions.reasoning: Article 20 explicitly requires governing bodies to approve cybersecurity risk-management measures, monitor their implementation, and be accountable for compliance breaches.
Article 20 mandates that management board members and all employees receive mandatory and recurring cybersecurity training.
Article 20 references risk-management measures under Article 21, which establishes the ISMS framework; ISMS capabilities underpin the security measures that boards must approve and oversee.
